trigger_evals.query: How do I enable MCP Apps in CAO? I want to see the fleet dashboard inside Claude Desktop.
The ui://cao/dashboard view isn't rendering in my MCP host. How do I debug this?
I need to rebuild the MCP Apps frontend bundles after making changes to cao_mcp_apps/
I want to add a new ui://cao/memory view that shows the memory wiki in the MCP Apps surface
How does the submit_command mutation choke point work in the MCP Apps layer?
The CAO web UI at localhost:9889 is showing a blank page
How do I set up the Gemini CLI provider in CAO?
Create a Discord notification plugin for CAO
How do I install a new agent profile with cao install?
Write a workflow spec for my CI pipeline

evals.prompt: I just installed CAO and want to enable the MCP Apps surface so I can monitor my agent fleet from Claude Desktop. What do I need to do?
evals.expected_output: Step-by-step instructions to enable MCP Apps including setting the CAO_MCP_APPS_ENABLED environment variable, starting cao-server and cao-mcp-server, and configuring the MCP host to connect to cao-mcp-server.
assertions: Mentions starting cao-server (REST + SSE on port 9889)
Mentions starting or configuring cao-mcp-server as the MCP endpoint
References the ui://cao/dashboard resource as the main fleet view
Mentions that the mcp_apps plugin must be registered/enabled
Notes that Node.js is NOT required to run the pre-built bundles

evals.prompt: I set CAO_MCP_APPS_ENABLED=true and started both servers, but when I ask Claude Desktop to show ui://cao/dashboard it says the resource isn't available. What's wrong?
evals.expected_output: Troubleshooting steps for diagnosing why the MCP Apps views aren't rendering, including checking plugin registration, verifying the environment variable is visible to cao-mcp-server, checking MCP host capability support, and verifying the built bundles exist.
assertions: Checks that CAO_MCP_APPS_ENABLED=true is set in the environment where cao-mcp-server runs (not just cao-server)
Verifies the mcp_apps plugin loaded by checking server startup logs or plugin list
Checks whether the MCP host supports the Apps extension (SEP-1865 capability advertisement)
Suggests verifying built bundle files exist in the expected location under cao_mcp_apps/ or ext_apps/
Mentions checking cao-mcp-server logs for resource registration errors
Suggests restarting both cao-server and cao-mcp-server after setting the env var

evals.prompt: I want to add a new ui://cao/logs view to the MCP Apps surface that shows real-time terminal logs. Where do I start and what's the pattern?
evals.expected_output: Guidance on adding a new MCP Apps view including creating the React component in cao_mcp_apps/, registering the resource URI, building the bundle, and following the existing patterns from dashboard/agent/event-stream views.
assertions: Points to cao_mcp_apps/ as the directory for view source files
References existing views (dashboard, agent, event-stream) as patterns to follow
Explains that the view must be registered as a ui://cao/logs resource in the MCP server
Mentions running the build command (npm run build or similar) to produce the single-file bundle
References the resource registration in src/cli_agent_orchestrator/mcp_server/ or ext_apps/
Mentions the submit_command tool as the mutation path if the view needs to trigger actions
